title: Fisher Information: Classical and Quantum
description: Deep dive into Fisher information theory - the mathematical foundation of precision bounds in parameter estimation. Master both classical and quantum formulations, understand their geometric interpretations, and explore multiparameter extensions.
learningObjectives: Derive the classical Fisher information from first principles
Understand the geometric interpretation of Fisher information as a metric
Compute the Quantum Fisher Information matrix for multiparameter estimation
Prove the hierarchy: Classical FI <= QFI
Apply the Symmetric Logarithmic Derivative formalism
Analyze the role of incompatibility in multiparameter quantum estimation
